caption: A young man with glasses and a black t-shirt featuring a graphic design stands in front of a whiteboard, likely in a classroom or presentation setting. He is wearing a lanyard with an ID badge around his neck. Initially, he gestures with both hands as if explaining or emphasizing a point, then brings his hands together in front of him, clasping them. His expression appears engaged and focused, suggesting he is actively communicating or presenting information to an audience. The setting includes a chair in the foreground and a plain wall in the background, indicating a simple, functional environment for teaching or discussion.
